name: The Hibachi (Kailua)
tagline: Windward side's hidden poke gem — assembled fresh to order right in front of you, with variety that puts the tourist spots to shame.
mustOrder: Fresh poke bowl — built to order with your choice of fish and toppings
Spicy ahi poke — creamy and flavorful, always a solid pick
Daily specials — ask what's new, they rotate preparations regularly
parking: Shopping center lot with ample parking
talkStory: A neighborhood poke and grill counter in a Kailua shopping center that earned a fiercely loyal Windward side following by keeping fish fresh and prices honest. They build your bowl right in front of you — ask what fish came in fresh that day. Regulars come multiple times a week. The sweet spot is mid-afternoon when the lunch rush has cleared but the selection is still good. Check hours as they can vary.
